_comment: Shipped preset for LTX-Video 2.3 22B text-to-video (from ComfyUI's bundled video_ltx2_3_t2v template). Outer graph is just SaveVideo + the subgraph instance #267; nearly everything lives inside the subgraph. After graphToPrompt expands the subgraph, the inner prompt node gets the composite id '267:266'. Sizing (1280x720x25fps x5s) is left at the template defaults — adjust via the sidebar later.
label: Local LTX 2.3 T2V
description: LTX-Video 2.3 22B text-to-video. Outputs a 5s 720p clip by default. Requires ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors (+ distilled lora + Gemma3 text encoder + LTX 2.3 spatial upscaler) — see workflows/video/README.md.

value.default: A cinematic shot, golden hour lighting, slow camera dolly forward.
